key_points: International students repeatedly ask about accommodation with no answers
No current students addressing housing questions in comments
Off-campus living costs are a common unknown for incoming students

Can you tell me about living apartment/meal approximately how much per month costing? (Out of campus)
Are you staying on campus? And what is the situation there right now?

key_points: Marching band and homecoming culture appear vibrant and celebrated
International student community is active, especially Nepali students
Limited data on domestic student social scene or Greek life

She won her crown and now she gets to command her people
My gosh Tash you're grown up... because of your skills you'll get the opportunity to grab everything around you

Zero firsthand reviews of dining halls from any source

key_points: No student mentions of counseling or mental health resources
Incoming freshman expressed panic and distress over missing orientation deadline
International students arriving alone report feeling isolated and scared

Exam format questions go unanswered — students unsure if proctored or not
2+2 transfer pathway from India to ASU is a known route but outcomes unclear

key_points: Orientation deadline confusion caused severe distress for at least one incoming freshman
No clear communication pathways apparent for students who miss deadlines
International students report getting no responses to basic logistical questions

I'm scared

Jonesboro location raises safety questions from Vietnamese and other international students

Arkansas's outdoor culture — rivers, lakes, hiking — is an underrated perk near campus
